member.name: T:BindingChaos.SignalAwareness.Contracts.SignalCapturedIntegrationEvent
member.summary: Integration event published when a signal is captured in the SignalAwareness bounded context. This event is used to notify other bounded contexts about signal capture without creating direct dependencies.
member.param: The unique identifier of the captured signal.
The identifier of the participant who captured the signal.
The optional latitude of the location where this signal occurred.
The optional longitude of the location where this signal occurred.
Optional tags associated with the signal.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.SignalAwareness.Contracts.SignalCapturedIntegrationEvent.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Nullable{System.Double},System.String[],System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Integration event published when a signal is captured in the SignalAwareness bounded context. This event is used to notify other bounded contexts about signal capture without creating direct dependencies.
member.param: The unique identifier of the captured signal.
The identifier of the participant who captured the signal.
The optional latitude of the location where this signal occurred.
The optional longitude of the location where this signal occurred.
Optional tags associated with the signal.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SignalAwareness.Contracts.SignalCapturedIntegrationEvent.SignalId
member.summary: The unique identifier of the captured signal.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SignalAwareness.Contracts.SignalCapturedIntegrationEvent.OriginatorId
member.summary: The identifier of the participant who captured the signal.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SignalAwareness.Contracts.SignalCapturedIntegrationEvent.Latitude
member.summary: The optional latitude of the location where this signal occurred.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SignalAwareness.Contracts.SignalCapturedIntegrationEvent.Longitude
member.summary: The optional longitude of the location where this signal occurred.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.SignalAwareness.Contracts.SignalCapturedIntegrationEvent.Tags
member.summary: Optional tags associated with the signal.
